title: One Piece
author: Oda Eiichiro
description: Monkey D. Luffy sets out to become the King of the Pirates, searching for the legendary treasure One Piece with his diverse crew.

title: Naruto
author: Masashi Kishimoto
description: A young ninja outcast strives to become the strongest ninja and earn recognition from his village.

title: Dragon Ball
author: Akira Toriyama
description: Son Goku's adventures from childhood through adulthood as he trains in martial arts and searches for Dragon Balls.

title: Bleach
author: Tite Kubo
description: Ichigo Kurosaki gains the powers of a Soul Reaper and must defend the living world from evil spirits called Hollows.

title: My Hero Academia
author: Kohei Horikoshi
description: In a world where most people have superpowers, a powerless boy dreams of becoming the greatest hero.

title: Demon Slayer
author: Koyoharu Gotouge
description: A boy becomes a demon slayer to save his sister and avenge his slaughtered family in Taisho-era Japan.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
author: Gege Akutami
description: A boy swallows a cursed talisman and must join a secret organization of Jujutsu Sorcerers to fight Cursed Spirits.

title: Attack on Titan
author: Hajime Isayama
description: Humanity lives behind walls to protect themselves from giant humanoid monsters called Titans.

title: Hunter x Hunter
author: Yoshihiro Togashi
description: Gon Freecss aspires to become a Hunter to find his missing father who is a legendary Hunter himself.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist
author: Hiromu Arakawa
description: Two brothers search for the Philosopher's Stone after a failed alchemy experiment leaves them scarred.

title: Fairy Tail
author: Hiro Mashima
description: Lucy Heartfilia joins the famous Fairy Tail wizard guild and goes on adventures with her eccentric guildmates.

title: Black Clover
author: Yuki Tabata
description: Asta, born without magic in a magical world, aims to become the Wizard King through pure determination.

title: Tokyo Revengers
author: Ken Wakui
description: A man travels back in time to his middle school days to save his girlfriend from a deadly gang.

title: Haikyuu!!
author: Haruichi Furudate
description: A short boy who loves volleyball joins a high school team determined to reach the nationals.

title: Blue Exorcist
author: Kazue Kato
description: Rin Okumura discovers he is the son of Satan and trains to become an exorcist to fight his father.

title: Soul Eater
author: Atsushi Okubo
description: Students at a death weapon meister academy train to collect souls and prevent the resurrection of an evil being.

title: The Seven Deadly Sins
author: Nakaba Suzuki
description: A princess searches for a legendary group of knights to help her save her kingdom from corrupt Holy Knights.

title: Dr. Stone
author: Riichiro Inagaki
description: After all of humanity is petrified, a genius scientist works to rebuild civilization using science.

title: Chainsaw Man
author: Tatsuki Fujimoto
description: A poor boy merges with his devil dog to become a devil hunter working for a secret government agency.

title: Spy x Family
author: Tatsuya Endo
description: A spy must create a fake family to complete his mission, unaware his fake wife is an assassin and adopted daughter a telepath.

title: Blue Lock
author: Muneyuki Kaneshiro
description: 300 elite strikers compete in an extreme training facility to become Japan's ultimate striker for the World Cup.

title: Dungeon Meshi
author: Ryoko Kui
description: After losing their provisions in a dungeon, adventurers begin cooking and eating the monsters they defeat.

title: Vinland Saga
author: Makoto Yukimura
description: A young Viking warrior seeks revenge for his father's death in the brutal world of Norse warriors.

title: Berserk
author: Kentaro Miura
description: The dark fantasy epic following Guts, a lone mercenary swordsman on a journey of revenge against a God Hand member.

title: Vagabond
author: Takehiko Inoue
description: A fictionalized account of the life of legendary Japanese swordsman Miyamoto Musashi during the Edo period.

title: Monster
author: Naoki Urasawa
description: A Japanese surgeon in Germany becomes a fugitive after a serial killer he saved as a child goes on a murderous rampage.

title: 20th Century Boys
author: Naoki Urasawa
description: A group of childhood friends must stop a cult whose plans for world domination match a story they wrote as kids.

title: Beastars
author: Paru Itagaki
description: In a world of anthropomorphic animals, a wolf struggles with his nature and his feelings for a rabbit.

title: Golden Kamuy
author: Satoru Noda
description: A veteran of the Russo-Japanese war and an Ainu girl race to find a hidden cache of Ainu gold in Hokkaido.

title: Mushishi
author: Yuki Urushibara
description: A traveler investigates supernatural lifeforms called Mushi and helps humans suffering from their effects.

title: Made in Abyss
author: Akihito Tsukushi
description: A girl and a robot boy descend into a mysterious, deadly abyss to find her missing mother.

title: Tokyo Ghoul
author: Sui Ishida
description: A college student becomes a half-ghoul after a deadly encounter and must navigate both human and ghoul societies.

title: Ajin: Demi-Human
author: Gamon Sakurai
description: A high school student discovers he is an Ajin, an immortal being hunted by the Japanese government.

title: Dorohedoro
author: Q Hayashida
description: A man with a reptile head searches for the sorcerer who transformed him while living in a chaotic slum world.

title: Homunculus
author: Hideo Yamamoto
description: A homeless man undergoes trepanation and gains the ability to perceive people's psychological complexes.

title: Sailor Moon
author: Naoko Takeuchi
description: A clumsy teenage girl discovers she is a reincarnated moon princess and must protect the Earth as Sailor Moon.

title: Fruits Basket
author: Natsuki Takaya
description: A kind orphan girl discovers her new family is cursed to transform into animals of the Chinese zodiac.

title: Ouran High School Host Club
author: Bisco Hatori
description: A scholarship student at an elite school accidentally breaks a vase and must join a host club of attractive boys.

title: Nana
author: Ai Yazawa
description: Two young women named Nana meet on a train to Tokyo and become close friends despite their very different personalities.

title: Kimi ni Todoke
author: Karuho Shiina
description: A shy girl misunderstood for her resemblance to a horror character slowly opens up thanks to the kindest boy in class.

title: Skip Beat!
author: Yoshiki Nakamura
description: A girl discovers her true passion for acting after her celebrity childhood friend betrays her.

title: Ao Haru Ride
author: Io Sakisaka
description: A girl reunites with her first love in high school only to find he has completely changed.

title: Akatsuki no Yona
author: Mizuho Kusanagi
description: A naive princess flees her kingdom after her father is murdered and sets out to reclaim her throne.

title: Cardcaptor Sakura
author: CLAMP
description: A ten-year-old girl accidentally releases magical cards into the world and must capture them all before disaster strikes.

title: The Ancient Magus' Bride
author: Kore Yamazaki
description: A young woman with the ability to see spirits is bought at auction by a non-human sorcerer who takes her as his apprentice and bride.

title: Your Lie in April
author: Naoshi Arakawa
description: A piano prodigy who can no longer hear his own music is revitalized by a free-spirited violinist.

title: Orange
author: Ichigo Takano
description: A girl receives letters from her future self warning her to save a transfer student from tragedy.

title: Bokura ga Ita
author: Yuki Obata
description: A girl falls for the most popular boy in class despite his complicated past relationship.

title: Maid Sama!
author: Hiro Fujiwara
description: The strict female student council president hides her secret job at a maid cafe from her schoolmates.

title: Natsume's Book of Friends
author: Yuki Midorikawa
description: A boy who can see spirits inherits his grandmother's Book of Friends and begins returning names to spirits.

title: Chihayafuru
author: Yuki Suetsugu
description: A girl becomes passionate about competitive karuta, a Japanese card game, after meeting a talented boy.

title: Nodame Cantabile
author: Tomoko Ninomiya
description: An elite music student meets an eccentric but talented pianist at music school and they push each other to grow.

title: Paradise Kiss
author: Ai Yazawa
description: A studious girl is recruited by a fashion design group and discovers her passion for modeling and life beyond academics.

title: Princess Jellyfish
author: Akiko Higashimura
description: A jellyfish-obsessed otaku girl befriends a stylish cross-dressing man who tries to help save her apartment complex.

title: Death Note
author: Tsugumi Ohba
description: A high school student finds a supernatural notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it and uses it to create a new world.

title: Rurouni Kenshin
author: Nobuhiro Watsuki
description: A legendary assassin from Japan's revolution becomes a wandering swordsman vowing never to kill again.

title: Detective Conan
author: Gosho Aoyama
description: A teenage detective is shrunk into a child's body by a criminal organization and must solve cases while hiding his identity.

title: Hajime no Ippo
author: George Morikawa
description: A timid high school boy begins boxing to toughen himself and discover what it means to be strong.

title: The Prince of Tennis
author: Takeshi Konomi
description: A tennis prodigy from America enrolls in a Japanese middle school and joins the tennis team, shaking up the sport.

title: Initial D
author: Shuichi Shigeno
description: A tofu delivery boy becomes a legendary street racer thanks to years of driving mountain roads in his father's car.

title: Kaiji
author: Nobuyuki Fukumoto
description: A down-on-his-luck man is invited to participate in a high-stakes gambling cruise to pay off his debts.

title: Liar Game
author: Shinobu Kaitani
description: An honest girl is drawn into a high-stakes psychological game of deception and must rely on a con man to survive.

title: Yotsuba!
author: Kiyohiko Azuma
description: An energetic five-year-old girl discovers the wonders of everyday life in her new neighborhood.

title: Barakamon
author: Satsuki Yoshino
description: A professional calligrapher exiled to a remote island regains his creative passion through interactions with quirky locals.

title: Silver Spoon
author: Hiromu Arakawa
description: A city student enrolls in an agricultural high school to escape pressure, discovering the realities of farm life.

title: Grand Blue
author: Kenji Inoue
description: A college student moves to a coastal town to start fresh but is immediately sucked into a diving club full of drinking and chaos.

title: Yuru Camp
author: Afro
description: A group of high school girls discover the joys of camping together across beautiful Japanese landscapes.

title: Gintama
author: Hideaki Sorachi
description: In an alternate Edo Japan occupied by aliens, a freelance samurai takes on odd jobs to pay rent.

title: Katekyo Hitman Reborn!
author: Akira Amano
description: A hapless boy is told he will become the next boss of a powerful mafia family and is trained by a baby hitman.

title: Claymore
author: Norihiro Yagi
description: Half-human half-monster warriors fight to protect humans from demons called Yoma while struggling with their own natures.

title: D.Gray-man
author: Katsura Hoshino
description: A young exorcist fights against the Millennium Earl who uses the souls of the dead to create demonic weapons.

title: The Promised Neverland
author: Kaiu Shirai
description: Children at a seemingly perfect orphanage discover the horrifying secret behind their comfortable lives.

title: Usagi Drop
author: Yumi Unita
description: A 30-year-old bachelor takes in his grandfather's young illegitimate daughter and navigates single parenthood.

title: Chi's Sweet Home
author: Konami Kanata
description: The daily life of an adorable kitten named Chi and the family who takes her in despite their no-pets policy.

title: Slam Dunk
author: Takehiko Inoue
description: A delinquent boy takes up basketball to impress a girl and discovers a natural talent for the sport.

title: Kuroko's Basketball
author: Tadatoshi Fujimaki
description: A phantom sixth man of a legendary middle school basketball team joins a new school to help build a team that can beat his former teammates.

title: Eyeshield 21
author: Riichiro Inagaki
description: A timid boy with incredible speed is forced to join an American football team and discovers his athletic potential.

title: Food Wars!
author: Yuto Tsukuda
description: An aspiring chef enters a prestigious cooking school where students battle each other in intense culinary showdowns.

title: Assassination Classroom
author: Yusei Matsui
description: A class of misfits must assassinate their alien teacher who has threatened to destroy Earth by graduation day.

title: Toriko
author: Mitsutoshi Shimabukuro
description: A powerful gourmet hunter travels the world in search of the ultimate foods to create the perfect full course meal.

title: Beelzebub
author: Ryuhei Tamura
description: The toughest delinquent in school becomes the caretaker of the son of the Demon King and must raise him as his own.

title: Ao no Exorcist
author: Kazue Kato
description: Rin Okumura, son of Satan, becomes an exorcist to protect the world from demons including those of his own lineage.

title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion
author: Goro Taniguchi
description: A prince in exile gains the power of absolute obedience and leads a rebellion to liberate Japan.

title: I Am a Hero
author: Kengo Hanazawa
description: A struggling manga artist must survive a zombie outbreak in Japan while questioning his own heroism.

title: Aku no Hana
author: Shuzo Oshimi
description: A bookish middle schooler is blackmailed by the class outcast after she catches him stealing a classmate's gym clothes.

title: Gantz
author: Hiroya Oku
description: Two teenagers killed by a train are resurrected and forced to fight aliens in deadly missions commanded by a mysterious black sphere.

title: Biomega
author: Tsutomu Nihei
description: In a virus-ravaged future, a synthetic human on a motorcycle searches for a special girl who could save humanity.

title: Prison School
author: Akira Hiramoto
description: Five boys who sneak into the girls' dormitory are sentenced to the school's underground prison by the student council.

title: Blame!
author: Tsutomu Nihei
description: A lone wanderer traverses a vast mechanized city that has grown out of control, searching for humans with a specific gene.

title: Goodnight Punpun
author: Inio Asano
description: The deeply personal story of Punpun Onodera, depicted as a tiny bird, growing up in a dysfunctional family in Japan.

title: Noragami
author: Adachitoka
description: A minor deity without a shrine works odd jobs for 5 yen while his human regalia fights to keep him from falling into darkness.

title: Re:Zero
author: Tappei Nagatsuki
description: A boy is transported to a fantasy world and discovers he can return from death, but at great emotional and psychological cost.

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
author: Fuse
description: A man reincarnates as a slime in a fantasy world and builds a nation where monsters and humans coexist.

title: Overlord
author: Kugane Maruyama
description: A gamer finds himself trapped in a game world as his powerful undead avatar and decides to conquer the world.

title: Goblin Slayer
author: Kumo Kagyu
description: A seasoned adventurer dedicates his life to exterminating goblins after they destroyed his village in childhood.

title: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon?
author: Fujino Omori
description: A young adventurer aims to become a hero in a city built around a labyrinthine dungeon where gods grant blessings to mortals.

title: Shaman King
author: Hiroyuki Takei
description: A boy who can commune with spirits aims to become the Shaman King and reshape the world.

title: Inuyasha
author: Rumiko Takahashi
description: A girl falls through a well into feudal Japan and teams up with a half-demon to collect the shards of a mystical jewel.

title: Ranma 1/2
author: Rumiko Takahashi
description: A martial artist who transforms into a girl when splashed with cold water is engaged to a girl who hates boys.

title: Yu Yu Hakusho
author: Yoshihiro Togashi
description: A teenage delinquent dies saving a child's life and is brought back as an Underworld Detective to fight supernatural threats.

title: Sword Art Online
author: Reki Kawahara
description: 10,000 players are trapped in a virtual reality game where dying in the game means dying in real life.

title: One Punch Man
author: ONE
description: A hero who can defeat any opponent with a single punch struggles with the existential boredom of being too powerful.

title: Mob Psycho 100
author: ONE
description: An emotionally stunted middle schooler with immense psychic power tries to live a normal life while growing as a person.

title: Shingeki no Bahamut: Twin Heads
author: Various
description: A fantasy adventure set in a world threatened by a catastrophic dragon sealed away long ago.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood
author: Hiromu Arakawa
description: Two brothers search for the Philosopher's Stone to restore their bodies after a failed alchemy experiment in this definitive retelling.
